title: Replace farm gallery images with real farm photos

requirements.summary: Replace the 'fresh lemon tree' gallery image with IMG_8398-1.jpeg and update its label to 'Lemon Trees'
acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the 'fresh lemon tree' image now displays IMG_8398-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Lemon Trees'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

file_operations.description: Update the gallery data array to replace the 'fresh lemon tree' image source with 'frontend/public/assets/generated/lemon-trees.dim_1200x800.jpg' and change its title/label to 'Lemon Trees'. Ensure the image path is correctly referenced for both the thumbnail grid and the lightbox modal.

requirements.summary: Replace the farm granary gallery image with IMG_8399-1.jpeg (flowering mango trees at sunset) and update its label to 'Flowering Mangoes'
acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the farm granary image now displays IMG_8399-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Flowering Mangoes'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

file_operations.description: Update the gallery data array to replace the farm granary image source with 'frontend/public/assets/generated/flowering-mangoes.dim_1200x800.jpg' and change its title/label to 'Flowering Mangoes'. Ensure the image path is correctly referenced for both the thumbnail grid and the lightbox modal.

requirements.summary: Replace the farm entrance gallery image with IMG_8402-1.jpeg (palm tree lined farm path) and update its label to 'Farm Greenery'
acceptanceCriteria: The gallery slot previously showing the farm entrance image now displays IMG_8402-1.jpeg
The label/caption for this gallery item reads 'Farm Greenery'
The image renders correctly in the gallery grid and lightbox modal

file_operations.description: Update the gallery data array to replace the farm entrance image source with 'frontend/public/assets/generated/farm-greenery.dim_1200x800.jpg' and change its title/label to 'Farm Greenery'. Ensure the image path is correctly referenced for both the thumbnail grid and the lightbox modal.
